testcase.name: toppingFindByRestaurantId_shouldReturnToppingsForGivenRestaurant
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: findByNameContainingIgnoreCase_shouldMatchPartialWord
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select ps1_0.id,ps1_0.pizza_id,ps1_0.price,ps1_0.size from pizza_sizes ps1_0 Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.base_price,p1_0.description,p1_0.image_url,p1_0.is_available,p1_0.name,p1_0.restaurant_id,p1_0.vegetarian from pizzas p1_0 where p1_0.id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_toppings where pizza_id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from pizza_sizes where id=? Hibernate: delete from toppings where id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.base_price,p1_0.description,p1_0.image_url,p1_0.is_available,p1_0.name,p1_0.restaurant_id,p1_0.vegetarian from pizzas p1_0 where upper(p1_0.name) like upper(?) escape '\\'

testcase.name: pizzaSizeRepository_shouldReturnEmptyWhenNotFound
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select ps1_0.id,ps1_0.pizza_id,ps1_0.price,ps1_0.size from pizza_sizes ps1_0 Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.base_price,p1_0.description,p1_0.image_url,p1_0.is_available,p1_0.name,p1_0.restaurant_id,p1_0.vegetarian from pizzas p1_0 where p1_0.id=?
